chapter goal: How do three coordinates remove the exceptional cases from two-dimensional geometry?
computational checks: cross-ratio invariance under a projective reparametrization
join/meet incidence for generated homogeneous points
mode-specific conic or hyperbolic numeric check when relevant
gaps: Proof-heavy material in Chapter 3 is represented by space diagrams, determinant/cross-ratio checks, or small parameter experiments rather than copied text.

visual sequence.expected_observation: Affine charts hide infinity, while homogeneous rays keep finite and infinite elements in one model.
visual sequence.learner_inspection_target: For Chapter 3, inspect affine plane embedded in r3 by identifying which objects instantiate rp2 from r3.
visual sequence.library: numpy, matplotlib, local projective/conic/Cayley-Klein helpers, and self-contained HTML
visual sequence.validation_target: homogeneous projection and incidence computations are finite
